name: A
notes: Profile for model 'A' (models/A.pth). Verified v2 / 768-dim / sr=40k / f0-conditioned via the Applio direct engine. pitch_shift=12 is the SELLER-recommended setting (range 10-14); A is a high/female-range model and at pitch 0 it collapsed to a neutral/metallic (电音) timbre -- +12 puts the input F0 in the model's trained range. Tune 10-14 per voice via --pitch. target_f0_median=200 is the A2 auto-center seed (hand-seeded; the emb_pitch weight-probe was NO-GO, see docs/f0_remap_plan.md): when the GUI auto-center toggle is on, the engine transposes the user's median F0 to ~200 Hz, REPLACING pitch_shift (no double-shift). index_rate=0.0 (V2.index NOT loaded): user A/B test found raw features sound best; the index averaged identity away. Bump index_rate>0 (and the engine will load models/V2.index) only if you want retrieval. protect=0.33 and rms_mix_rate=1.0 are faithful defaults (the direct engine forces faithful loudness regardless of rms_mix_rate). f0_method here (rmvpe) is the profile fallback; run_A_direct bakes --direct-f0 fcpe (smoother + ~30% faster). FORMANT (性别因子): formant_timbre is the stftpitchshift distortion = a DIRECT formant-frequency multiplier (measured: centroidRatio ~= value); >1.0 = formants up (feminine), <1.0 = down. M->F target ~1.15-1.25 (tools/measure_formant.py). The seller's '0.25' is WRONG for this engine (it shifts formants DOWN to ~0.28x); leave formant off (1.0) until an A/B picks a value ~1.1-1.2. Paths are relative to the project root.
